action.reasoning: Observation: Iter3 with sampler+RandAugment+label_smoothing+val_bal_acc selection reached high val_bal_acc=0.8805 but test balanced_accuracy slightly regressed to 0.564 (bird dropped sharply to 0.074 while squirrel improved). Best remains 0.5657 from CLIP-ViT iter2. Analysis: Overfitting to source domains despite augs; rare class imbalance and domain shift (lighting/backgrounds) not fully addressed by current regularization. Decision: Incrementally add Mixup (alpha=0.2) for stronger generalization/regularization, combine with weighted CE loss, slightly higher LR=3e-5 with linear warmup, keep 20 epochs and best-val_bal checkpointing. Update predict.py with simple TTA (original + hflip averaged logits) to boost inference without extra training cost. This targets rare classes and robustness; submit_eval after to measure within ~1.5h remaining budget.
